statement: VirtualAuto can execute its minimal structural evidence path in Blender 5.0.1 on the tested Windows host.
scope: Synthetic fixture creation, runtime capture, and structural inventory
confidence_basis: The expected attributes were recovered by fresh Blender processes and the records pass strict validation.
boundaries: Validated only for Blender 5.0.1 build a3db93c5b259 on the recorded Windows host.
Does not validate automotive assets, rendering quality, material physics, package extraction, or cross-platform Blender execution.
